name: GMexico Transportes, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: GM√É¬©xico Transportes, S. A. B. de C. V. operates as a railway transportation company in Mexico. It provides general hauling and intermodal railroad services, as well as passenger transportation services; and auxiliary terminal management and inter-terminal hauling services. The company operates a fleet of 814 locomotives and 29,148 cars. It serves agriculture, automotive, cement, energy, intermodal, metals and mining, industrial products, and chemicals and fertilizers segments. The company is based in Mexico City, Mexico. GM√É¬©xico Transportes, S. A. B. de C. V. is a subsidiary of Grupo M√É¬©xico, S.A.B. de C.V.
